zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn於1150年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire盧維時，他的父親Ferquhard Strathearn25歲，母親Ethne Ruthven20歲。他於大約1170年與Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1223年在蘇格蘭培爾享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn于1150年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire盧維时，他的父亲Ferquhard Strathearn25岁，母亲Ethne Ruthven20岁。他于大约1170年与Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1223年在苏格兰培爾享年73岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

variants.name: Brie
meanings: Variant spelling of Bree , altered in form to coincide with the name of a district in northern France (so called from Late Latin bracia ‘marshland’) famous for its production of a variety of soft cheese. This is now a relatively common first name in Australia.

nameMeanings.name: Third
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish: locative name from one or more of various minor places so called because they were at one time farms divided among three tenants.

nameMeanings.name: Earl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

variants.name: Earle
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn was born in 1150, in Ruthven, Forfarshire, Scotland, his father, Ferquhard Strathearn, was 25 and his mother, Ethne Ruthven, was 20. He married Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn about 1170, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1223, in Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn est né en 1150, à Ruthven, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, Ferquhard Strathearn, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ethne Ruthven, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn environ 1170, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1223, à Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn 1150 in Ruthven, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ferquhard Strathearn 25 und seine Mutter Ethne Ruthven 20. Er hat um 1170 in Schottland, United Kingdom Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1223 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn è nato il nel 1150 nel Ruthven, Forfarshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Ferquhard Strathearn, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Ethne Ruthven, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn circa 1170, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1223, nel Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearnが1150年にスコットランドForfarshireルスベンで生まれた時，父Ferquhard Strathearnは25歳，母Ethne Ruthvenは20歳であった。約1170年にイギリススコットランドでMatilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1223年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで73歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn(이)가 1150년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 루스븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ferquhard Strathearn(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ethne Ruthven(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1170년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1223년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn nasceu em 1150, em Ruthven, Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, Ferquhard Strathearn, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ethne Ruthven, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn aproximadamente 1170, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1223, em Perthshire, Scotland, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn родился в 1150 г. в местности рутвен, Forfarshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Ferquhard Strathearn было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ethne Ruthven, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn около 1170 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1223 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn nació en 1150, en Ruthven, Forfarshire, Scotland, su papá, Ferquhard Strathearn, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ethne Ruthven, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn aproximadamente 1170, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 15 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1223, en Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
